name: meta-kim
description: Governance layer for AI coding: meta agents, workflow contract, meta-theory; canonical in .claude/, with generated Codex/OpenClaw companions.

scripts.graphify:check: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{const v=execSync('python --version',{encoding:'utf8',shell:true});console.log(v.trim())}catch{try{const v=execSync('python3 --version',{encoding:'utf8',shell:true});console.log(v.trim())}catch{console.log('Python not found')}}try{const g=execSync('graphify --version',{encoding:'utf8',shell:true});console.log('graphify',g.trim())}catch{console.log('graphify not installed')}"
scripts.check: npm run check:runtimes && npm run validate
scripts.verify:all: npm run check && npm run check:global:meta-theory && node scripts/eval-meta-agents.mjs --require-all-runtimes && npm run test:meta-theory
scripts.verify:all:live: npm run check && npm run check:global:meta-theory && node scripts/eval-meta-agents.mjs --require-all-runtimes --live && npm run test:meta-theory

author: KimYx0207
